programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends
programme.desc: The story of the Von Erichs enters its most devastating chapter; at the height of their success, brother Mike is struck by rare toxic shock syndrome; as the family struggles to recover, Kerry survives a horrific motorcycle crash that costs him his foot; the series of tragedies that follows is unthinkable; so haunting is their story that it inspired a 2023 feature film.

programme.title: WWE LFG
programme.desc: Things get heated in the first tag match of the season, while Kevin Owens and Natalya help two female Future Greats find their inner aggression; and in the main event, Coach Bubba helps Drake Morreaux put it all on the line against newcomer Nathan Cranton.

programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: The incomparable "Rowdy" Roddy Piper stood above all when it came to antagonizing audiences worldwide; the Hot Rod is an all-time WWE Legend, and his antics will be remembered for generations to come; relive his unforgettable boxing match with Mr. T at WrestleMania 2, his instant classic with Bret "Hitman" Hart, and the talk show that started it all Piper's Pit!

programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: There's nothing like a first impression! And in the world of WWE, the first appearance of a Superstar means everything, especially in the unpredictable era of the 1990s; witness the greatest debuts of superstars like Mankind, Kurt Angle, Undertaker, The Rock and so many more!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release, the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary; a one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The bidders look for deals in Mesquite, Texas; items procured include a refurbished pool table and vintage equestrian gear; Jenny suffers a head injury.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: In the town of DeSoto, Victor scores a find and rushes to the fire department; Jenny obtains some old furniture; tension between the women boils over.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny bids on a massive locker; Rene and Casey attempt to go small; Shana and Edwina's mystery box is mislabeled.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi's store reopens; Dave sets an auction record, while Darrell feels the pressure; Barry hopes an old top hat will yield some magic.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers seek industrial merchandise and antiques; a wine rack intrigues Jarrod and Brandi; Dave and Barry put their knowledge of oddities to the test.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dan and Laura take the buyers on a wild ride through the Inland Empire; Ivy gets an eyeful; Mary hopes to land treasure by purchasing early.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy records a hefty find in Adelanto, Calif.; Brandi and Jarrod hit it big when they test the waters; Mary cranks up her profit to the sweet sound of success.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers visit Moreno Valley, Calif.; Justin's congeniality earns him Rene's goodwill and a chance to level up; Darrell's tubular locker tests out okay.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Berkeley County South Carolina officers go the extra mile in a high-speed chase. K9 patrol in Wilmington, North Carolina, use their dogs to sniff out a carload of potential contraband. Officers in Citrus County, Florida, track down a stolen vehicle used for suspicious activity.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A highly irate man at a burger joint in El Paso is tased by police. Richland County police find a bag full of possible drugs in a suspicious car. Pasco County police respond to a landlord-tenant dispute, only to find the landlord eating a large chunk of ham.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Richland County South Carolina officers smell marijuana coming from a car, which leads to a car and foot chase. An officer in Wilmington North Carolina responds to a disturbance call by showing off her football throwing skills.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A chase ensues in Tallahassee, while in Volusia County officers are hot on the trail of two vehicles suspected to be stolen; in Lawrence, an argument over a chicken sandwich ends with a speeding stop and a DUI arrest.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Berkeley, a vehicle pursuit turns into a foot chase with K9 Dixie leading the charge; in Pomona, officers confront an individual armed with a bolt cutter; in Richland, a stash of drugs, guns and cash is revealed.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Counterfeit bills turn up in Tulsa; a pat down in Alabama turns into a treasure hunt when officers discover pants packed with weed and socks lined with money; in Florida, cinnamon whiskey fuels a bizarre scene.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In South Carolina, a field test reveals the truth behind a baggie of powder; in Jefferson County, a high-speed chase turns into a foot pursuit where neighbors pitch in to help; in East Providence, a roadside stop uncovers a messy situation.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Jefferson County, a traffic stop turns dangerous; in Tulsa, officers pull over a suspected stolen vehicle; in Missoula, police search for a rider on horseback accused of rustling cattle.
